chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1557 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 16.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Jamil Ahmed, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Noor Nabi Buriro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G a/w ASI Niaz Hussain Kaleri of P.S Punhal Khan Chandio. Respondents No.4 & 6 are present in person. = Today, Chanesar by caste Chandio is present alongwith his daughter Mst. Rashida, the petitioner. On Court notice the concerned ASI Niaz Hussain of P.S Punhal Khan Chandio is also in attendance alongwith private respondents No.4 & 6-Imam Bux and Hussain Bux respectively. The private respondents have undertaken that they will not cause any harassment to the petitioner and his family. In this regard, the police officials are directed to ensure that no one including the private respondents should be allowed to cause harassment to the petitioner and his family and all the more it is the duty of the police officials to ensure that no citizen of this Country should be pressurized in respect of matrimonial issues. The police will provide protection to the petitioner and her family whenever they are approached with such a request. At this juncture, the learned Assistant A.G states that considering the sensitive nature of the matter, it would be just and proper if private respondents are directed to execute a bond for their good behaviour before the concerned Police Station. Order accordingly. The SHO of the concerned Police Station will call upon the private respondents to execute such bond in the sum of Rs.5000/- each.

Order accordingly. The SHO of the concerned Police Station will call upon the private respondents to execute such bond in the sum of Rs.5000/- each. With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
